entities.name: ETHERIFIED P-COUMARIC ACID

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The quality of whole stems influenced by soluble sugars and cell wall type

entities.name: FEED VALUE

entities.description: The underlying genetic factors that determine the composition and feed value of stover

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Initiatives aimed at identifying traits to improve crop quality
